title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: Tired of PayPal hold periods freezing your earnings? Sick of Gumroad payout delays that leave you without cash? You're not alone. As a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or Pakistan, you face unique payment challenges. We've helped hundreds of creators in these countries and elsewhere get paid. Now, we're showing you how to set up a NOWPayments digital store, no PayPal required. Follow this step-by-step guide to unlock a seamless, global payment experience.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments is the perfect solution for creators who need a payment processor that can handle transactions in 300+ coins, without the hassle of KYC or buyer account requirements. This method works because NOWPayments bypasses traditional payment gateways, allowing you to sell your digital products directly to your customers without intermediaries. You get instant, automated delivery, and no payment processor account required.
What You Need Before You Start

Converting crypto to local currency is the step that most guides skip over, but it is the one that makes or breaks the practical value of crypto payments for creators in restricted markets. In Nigeria, the most common route is USDT to naira through Binance P2P or local exchanges like Patricia or Quidax. Rates are typically within 2-5% of the parallel market rate. In Ghana, cedis conversion happens through Binance P2P and local WhatsApp-based P2P groups with comparable rates. In Kenya, USDT to Kenyan shilling conversion is available through M-Pesa integrations on several exchanges. In Pakistan, local exchanges and Binance P2P both offer PKR pairs. The process is faster and cheaper than traditional international wire transfers in every case.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

The settlement speed difference between crypto and conventional platforms is not incremental — it is categorical. USDT on Tron settles in under 60 seconds. Bitcoin Lightning settles in seconds with negligible fees. On-chain Bitcoin settles in 10-60 minutes depending on network congestion. Compare this to PayPal's 3-5 business day bank transfer, Gumroad's weekly or monthly payout cycles, or wire transfers that take 3-7 days and cost $20-50 in bank fees each way. For a creator who needs to pay for tools, services, or simply cover expenses, the difference between instant settlement and a 30-day payout cycle is not just inconvenient — it is a cash flow problem that affects what you can build.
NOWPayments bypasses traditional payment gateways, allowing you to sell digital products directly to your customers.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Promote your store to your audience, and be ready to receive payments in your preferred cryptocurrencies. When you receive a payment, the NOWPayments Core Engine will automatically deliver your digital product to the customer, while also generating a PDF receipt for your records. Make sure to keep your store updated with the latest Full Stack Bundle features to ensure a smooth customer experience.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows, you'll want to scale your payment and delivery pipeline to handle increased traffic. To do this, upgrade to the Full Stack Bundle, which includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you set up a robust store infrastructure. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll be able to handle larger sales volumes, while also enjoying the benefits of a streamlined payment and delivery process.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
The Full Stack Bundle includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you set up a robust store infrastructure.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Creators exploring crypto payment options for digital products often have the same core question: how do I actually get the money into my local currency? The answer is a two-step process: receive USDT through NOWPayments into your wallet, then convert to local currency through a P2P exchange at near-market rates. The Core Shop Engine at $49.99 automates the first half of this — payment verification and delivery happen without any manual steps. The Admin Dashboard at $29.99 gives you the transaction log you need to track what came in. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes everything. More at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To set up a NOWPayments digital store, follow these steps: Create a NOWPayments account and integrate the Core Engine into your store. Configure your payment settings to accept the desired cryptocurrencies. Test your payment pipeline to ensure seamless transactions. Promote your store to your audience and be ready to receive payments. Monitor your store's performance and upgrade to the Full Stack Bundle as needed.
USDT payments arrive instantly, thanks to NOWPayments' real-time settlement system.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
